title: Feature Catalog
description: Master list of system features with role-visibility tagging. Cross-references actor-registry, permission-matrix, sitemap. Feeds writers (TKKT/TKCS/TKCT/HDSD) and test-case generation.

roles.description: Role slugs — denormalized from actor-registry for quick filtering.

services.description: Optional grouping for monorepo / microservice layouts.

features.description: Flat feature list. When 'services' is present, features are also nested per service for clarity.

description.description: Vietnamese full description: WHAT the feature does (function), WHO uses it (actors), WHERE it lives (module/screen). Min 200 chars to prevent thin upstream output.

business_intent.description: WHY this feature exists. Business goal, KPI it serves, regulation it satisfies, or pain point it solves. Min 100 chars. Producer MUST extract from doc-brief.md or ask user — never invent.

flow_summary.description: HOW the feature works end-to-end: trigger → main steps → outcome. Tóm tắt luồng nghiệp vụ (3-7 bước). Min 150 chars. Source for HDSD section + test scenario derivation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then or imperative). ≥ 3 items, mỗi item ≥ 30 chars. Anchor cho Cursor SDLC implementation + test case generation.

business_rules.description: Rule-style invariants/constraints (validation rules, calculation formulas, state transitions). Optional but recommended for non-trivial features.

user_stories.description: Optional 'As a {role}, I want {action}, so that {benefit}' statements.

role_variants.description: Per-role behavior overrides. Keyed by role slug. References sitemap.feature_overrides for UI specifics.

routes.description: Route paths from sitemap.routes[].path that implement this feature.

entities.description: Domain entity ids touched by this feature.

test_evidence_ref.description: Path to test-evidence.json entry for this feature, e.g. docs/intel/test-evidence/{feature-id}.json. Populated by resume-feature QA stage; consumed by generate-docs Stage 3a/4f instead of re-running Playwright.

implementation_evidence.description: Captured by close-feature when sealing the feature. Cross-ref bridge between SDLC and docs.

test_files.description: Relative paths to test files for this feature.

adrs.description: ADR file paths created/updated by this feature.

confidence.description: high=multi-source verified (code + doc agree); medium=single producer; low=inferred (e.g. controller name only); manual=user-confirmed via interview. Consumers (generate-docs Stage 4) MUST route by tier — see notepads/confidence-routing.md.

readiness.description: Three-aspect readiness status orthogonal to lifecycle status. Decouples doc-readiness, QA-readiness, release-readiness. Backward-compat: features without this field treated as documentation=missing, qa=missing, release=blocked.

documentation.description: Set by generate-docs based on output completeness: ready=all required docs generated; partial=fallback synthesis used; missing=not yet generated.

qa.description: Set by resume-feature QA stage based on atomic triple + min_tc quota: ready=all conditions met; partial=executed but below quota; missing=no executed TCs.

release.description: Set by close-feature: ready iff documentation=ready AND qa=ready AND reviewer verdict=Approved.
